headline: Medicare Advantage Mental Health Coverage in New York: $0–$30 Online Therapy Sessions
summary: Manhattan Mental Health Counseling, the highest-rated affordable online therapy practice is now in-network with five major Medicare Advantage carriers. They now cover 78% of the state’s 1.8 million beneficiaries.NEW YORK, March 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Manhattan Mental Health Counseling (MMHC), A rapidly growing, New York-based outpatient telehealth psychotherapy practice today announced expanded Medicare Advantage mental health coverage. headline: Does Scrutiny Of Medical Cost Trends And Disclosures Change The Bull Case For Molina Healthcare (MOH)?
summary: Molina Healthcare recently presented at the TD Cowen 46th Annual Health Care Conference in Boston, while facing a wave of analyst reassessments and a shareholder legal investigation into its financial disclosures and medical cost trend assumptions. The combination of fresh scrutiny over medical cost trends and questions about alignment between premium rates and utilization is reshaping how investors assess Molina’s risk profile. Next, we’ll examine how the legal probe into medical cost trend...

headline: Centene Is the Worst S&P 500 Stock Today. What’s Ailing the Health Insurer.
summary: Centene’s CEO says the company expects to see continued contraction in its Affordable Care Act marketplace.

headline: From Red to Green: How Trump's Iran Endgame Sparked a Wall Street Comeback
summary: Oil crashed 30% in a single session. Stagflation fears evaporated in real time. And a handful of company-specific stories made Monday one of the more memorable trading days of the year, for reasons both dramatic and surprisingly bullish.

raw.headline: From Red to Green: How Trump's Iran Endgame Sparked a Wall Street Comeback
